feedback.text: Make if any sales are not permanent to not use sale as keyword, lent maybe? since nowadays many companies sell things that later get taken away never to be seen again. Maybe make it if they take back their sold product they also give refunds? Many games use gambling like lootboxes, disguised currencies, no refunds and dark patterns are used in games for kids like dota2,fortnite,roblox. dota 2 has lootboxes and several online gambling casinos work with game items targeted to 10+ year old gamers or maybe even less. Services like mastercard and visa recently removed thousands of games that are not illegal because maybe they had violence or sexual acts if they are to safekeep us maybe they should be help accountable with fines when not? Or make them act as a service and nothing else. Games we have bought stop working if the developers have finished extracting as much money they can, maybe force game companies to plan for end of life and also make it known when you buy a game that it has an expiration date (since its not possible to predict when but It will expire when developers decide so or something would be really helpful. Or how now more and more online products get turned as subscription products after they have been already sold to costumers, imagine how many will be thrown away, discarded, Or how lifetime deals don't mean forever but maybe up to 5 years or something is becoming the normal in digital products Recently UK added a law so users must authenticate their age when using adult sites or anything else, is that not a privacy nightmare? uploading your photo online to every company? more and more companies are getting hacked nowadays like the tea app recently.. if companies get hacked they should be held accountable and maybe even pay a fine and something like their global Thank you really hope you take a look at least some of these.
